proposals.title: Build Constitution Guardian Agent
proposals.summary: Create a governance agent that checks proposed actions and repository changes against institutional doctrine and authority rules.
proposals.rationale: The kernel has agents, permissions, memory, and executive structure. The next governance step is an agent capable of saying no before institutional rules are violated.
proposals.expectedBenefit: Reduces risk of founder, agent, or contributor actions bypassing institutional doctrine.

proposals.title: Create Founder Independence Index
proposals.summary: Define and measure how dependent the institution remains on founder knowledge, credentials, and manual judgment.
proposals.rationale: The long-term vision requires the institution to outlive any one contributor. Founder dependence should become a measurable institutional risk.
proposals.expectedBenefit: Turns succession and continuity into an explicit engineering metric.
